text.content:
☠ Blood Sorcery

Level 1: Corrosive Vitae

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: -- (automatic, Dex + Athletics to aim spit) | Type: Combat

Transmute your blood into a caustic acid. Spit or smear vitae on a surface to corrode it — dissolves metal locks, weakens doors, burns through rope. Deals 2 Superficial damage (Aggravated to mortals) if used on a living target. The acid remains potent for one turn per success on the Rouse check. Cannot be used on your own body without harming yourself.

Level 1: A Taste for Blood

Cost: Free | Pool: Res + Blood Sorcery | Type: Utility

By tasting a drop of blood, learn the following about its source: mortal or supernatural, approximate generation (if Kindred), blood resonance and temperament, whether a Blood Bond exists and roughly how strong. Each success reveals one fact. You can also determine if the blood has been tampered with (poisoned, magically altered). The blood must be relatively fresh (within 24 hours).

Level 2: Extinguish Vitae

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Blood Sorcery vs Sta + Composure | Type: Combat

Target a vampire within line of sight and force their body to consume its own blood. The target immediately makes a Rouse check that they cannot avoid — on a failure, their Hunger increases by 1. You can force additional Rouse checks with additional successes (1 extra check per 2 net successes). If this would push the target to Hunger 5, they must immediately check for Hunger Frenzy. Range: 20 meters.

Level 3: Blood of Potency

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Res + Blood Sorcery | Type: Utility

Temporarily concentrate the power of your vitae, lowering your effective generation by 1 per success (minimum generation 8). This increases your Blood Potency for purposes of power bonuses, blood surge, and mending. Lasts one scene. At the end, make a Rouse check for each level of generation reduced — Hunger may spike dramatically when the effect wears off. Does not affect actual generation for Dominate comparisons.

Level 3: Scorpion's Touch

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Str + Blood Sorcery vs Sta + Resolve | Type: Combat

Transmute your blood into a paralytic venom. Coat a weapon, apply to your fangs, or spit it at a target. On contact with a living being, the venom inflicts agonizing pain and reduces the target's Physical dice pools by your Blood Sorcery rating for the scene. Vampires resist with Stamina + Resolve (difficulty = your successes). Mortals are not entitled to a resistance roll. The venom evaporates after one scene if unused.

Level 4: Theft of Vitae

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Wits + Blood Sorcery vs Wits + Occult | Type: Combat

Rip the blood from a target's body at a distance. Crimson streams visibly fly from the victim to you. The target takes 2 Aggravated Health damage as blood is torn from their veins. You reduce your Hunger by 1 per 2 successes on the roll (minimum Hunger 0). Range: line of sight, up to 30 meters. Contested roll — the target can attempt to resist. Mortals who witness this are likely to flee or enter shock. Extremely Masquerade-threatening.

Level 5: Baal's Caress

Cost: 2 Rouse | Pool: -- | Type: Combat

Coat a melee weapon in your vitae, transforming it into a supernatural instrument of destruction. For the rest of the scene, the weapon deals Aggravated damage to all targets, including vampires. The weapon glows faintly with an inner crimson light. The effect persists until the weapon is sheathed, dropped, or the scene ends. Each attack with the coated weapon costs no additional Rouse — the initial activation is sufficient.

Level 5: Cauldron of Blood

Cost: 2 Rouse | Pool: Res + Blood Sorcery vs Sta + Resolve | Type: Combat

Boil the blood inside a target's body. The target must be within line of sight and within 10 meters. The victim's blood literally boils — they take 3 Aggravated damage that cannot be soaked. Vampires lose blood as it evaporates: Hunger increases by 2. If this kills a mortal, their body ruptures. Vampires at Hunger 5 who are hit by this must immediately check for Hunger Frenzy at Difficulty 4. Extremely visible and Masquerade-breaking.
